_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to use critical thinking to analyze organizational patterns and relationships.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including stakeholder interviews, artifact review, maturity scoring, and finding synthesis.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-A-001 (AB, cosine: 0.443), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.407).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.614). Shared vocabulary: [organizational, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, critical, patterns, relationships, thinking, use] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.896, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill to use critical thinking to analyze organizational patterns and relationsh" and "Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.467 < STS 0.614 (gap -0.147). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analyze, critical, patterns] and [ai, artifact, assessments] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [organizational, skill]. DCWF-only: [analyze, critical, patterns, relationships, thinking, use]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic].
